_comment: Full SupportCardRecord entries for Global cards missing from the pinned upstream (upstream-pin lag, docs/provenance.md §3.2). Generated by scripts/extract-card-additions.ts against master.mdb; schema-validated and inserted BEFORE overrides by scripts/build-all.ts. Delete entries when the upstream pin catches up (duplicate ids fail the build). Emptied 2026-06-19: the v0.16.1 pin (76214c82) now emits 30102/30103/30104, so all three additions were retired.
